name: Uma Musume - Let's Train!
description:
📗LOREBOOK TEST📘

All right due to popular demand i present to you....

"Uma Musume: Let's Train"

A safe for work bot including all the same horse girls in the NSFW versión, the plot is simple:

"You're a trainer, Tracen Academy contacts you, you train the girls by learning her capabilties and forming a strong bond with them, help them achieve their goals, some will be more difficult than others according to the real lore, so choose wisely"

—Select the girl you want from the start or let the bot decide for you randomly, both options work.

I hope you like the bot, I tried to make it somewhat interactive but without copying the plot of the existing game, so... Enjoy, leave reviews and all that!!!

Highly recommend proxy!

•Now includes a lorebook of the universe of uma musume, I hope you can improve your roleplays•
